loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing today's active and reactive energy import; per-phase breakdown and progress metrics are omitted as they are not measured or configured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: one or more leaves could not be bound for this card on this asset — those leaves render an honest blank (per-leaf reasons attached), every other leaf fills

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power as both HV Input and LV Output (single-point meter); loss and efficiency are derived from total active power.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load and load factor — expected load profiles, anomaly counts, and event details are not measured by this asset.
